overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character running through Los Santos International Airport. The video begins in a covered walkway with distinctive perforated concrete walls, transitions through an open plaza with the airport control tower, and ends approaching the terminal entrance. Bright sunny weather with clear shadows throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway between airport parking structures

agents.ego_description: running along the covered walkway following two pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead along the path, one in red shirt

entered.detail: tall curved wall with circular cutouts casting geometric shadow patterns on the ground
red and purple flowering bushes planted along the base of the wall
grey metal electrical utility box mounted on the right wall
white structural support column for the overhead covered structure

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a covered walkway with distinctive perforated concrete walls on the left and a solid wall on the right. The camera follows two pedestrians walking ahead through dappled sunlight. Red flowering bushes line the path, and the environment is sheltered from direct sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open airport plaza with control tower and parking structures

events.description: exits covered walkway into open sunlit plaza with airport control tower visible ahead

agents.ego_description: running through the open plaza toward the control tower, passing a worker in a safety vest

notable_agents.action: airport worker in yellow safety vest walking across the plaza

entered.detail: tall cylindrical airport control tower with observation deck and antenna array
multi-story parking garage with perforated concrete block facade
blue directional sign with white text indicating car park zones 4A, 4B, 4C
tall palm trees scattered around the plaza perimeter
red sedan parked near the base of the control tower

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright sunlit plaza dominated by the airport control tower. The camera runs past a worker in a safety vest and approaches the tower. Multi-story parking structures flank the plaza, and a red car is parked near the tower base. The environment shifts from sheltered to fully exposed.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved airport access road lined with palm trees

events.description: turns left from the plaza onto the curved road passing the parking structure

agents.ego_description: turning left onto the airport road and running past palm trees toward the terminal

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt and jeans crossing the road from right to left

entered.detail: large blue overhead gantry signs directing to terminals and parking
airport terminal building entrance becoming visible at the end of the road

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left onto a curved road lined with palm trees. The control tower recedes behind as the terminal entrance comes into view ahead. A pedestrian crosses the road, and blue overhead directional signs span the roadway. The parking structure remains visible on the left but grows more distant.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk approaching Los Santos International Airport terminal

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath the airport terminal overhang

agents.ego_description: running along the covered sidewalk approaching the terminal entrance where NPCs are gathered

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing and conversing near the terminal entrance doors

entered.detail: Los Santos International Airport terminal facade with corrugated metal paneling
white concrete bench with wooden slats along the walkway
brown metal trash can next to the bench
large illuminated sign on the terminal roof displaying the airport name

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway beneath the airport terminal overhang. The Los Santos International Airport sign is visible on the building ahead. Concrete benches and trash receptacles line the left side. A group of NPCs stands near the entrance doors. The lighting shifts from bright sun to shaded as the camera moves under the terminal structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered airport walkway into a bright open plaza and finally toward the shaded terminal entrance. It begins within a covered corridor featuring perforated concrete walls and red flowering bushes, following pedestrians through dappled sunlight. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a fully exposed, sunlit plaza dominated by the airport control tower and flanked by multi-story parking structures. The movement then shifts left onto a curved road lined with palm trees and blue overhead signs, leaving the tower behind as the terminal comes into view. Finally, the camera moves under the terminal overhang, where the lighting shifts from bright sun back to shade as it approaches the Los Santos International Airport sign and a group of waiting pedestrians.
